# Copilot Workspace Instructions

- When using terminal commands for this project, always initialize and activate conda first:
  - `& "C:\Users\yongjie\anaconda3\shell\condabin\conda-hook.ps1"; conda activate bwg;`
- Do not run Python or pip commands in this workspace without the conda activation prefix.
- Prefer `python` from `C:\Users\yongjie\anaconda3\envs\bwg\python.exe`.
- Keep all Python dependency operations scoped to the `bwg` conda environment.
